# Purple Directive — full brief

> Purple Directive builds compliance-grade software and operations tooling for
> the people who run clinical research — independent sites, site networks, and
> CROs. One operating standard spans the portfolio: a clinical trial management
> system, ICH-GCP SOP templates, e-signatures designed and tested against
> 21 CFR Part 11, free in-browser PDF tools, and hands-on regulatory consulting.

## What Purple Directive is
Purple Directive is a software-and-operations practice for clinical research
sites. The unifying idea is inspection readiness: a research site's records
should survive an FDA or sponsor audit by default — every change captured with
who, what, when, and why, appended and never overwritten. The products range
from a full clinical trial management system down to free single-purpose tools,
but they share that standard.

A note on compliance language, because it matters in this field: Purple
Directive says its products are "designed and tested against 21 CFR Part 11" and
"aligned with ICH-GCP", never "Part 11 certified" or "HIPAA compliant" as a bare
claim. Part 11 and HIPAA have no certification body that issues a compliant
stamp; the controls are real and testable, and the regulatory attestation is the
customer's to make with the evidence provided.

## Products in detail

### Nexrial CTMS — https://nexrial.com
A multi-tenant clinical trial management system built for independent research
sites and small site networks — the segment enterprise CTMS pricing effectively
excludes. Nexrial is one system of record for the whole site: delegation and
training logs, Form FDA 1572, subject and visit tracking with visit-window
compliance, visit-to-invoice billing, IRB-renewal and protocol-amendment
deadline tracking, and a database-layer append-only audit trail with native PI
e-signatures designed and tested against 21 CFR Part 11. It runs alongside your
existing eReg/eISF binder and is not an EDC. Pricing is flat and per-site:
Core $299/month, Pro $599/month, Enterprise from $999/month (roughly 20% cheaper
billed annually), with a Founding Site Program at 50% off for life for the first
few sites. A HIPAA Business Associate Agreement is executed before any PHI is
entered.

### Clinical Research SOP Template Bundle — https://purpledirective.com/sop-bundle
13 ICH-GCP-aligned standard operating procedures with 11 companion forms, across
95 pages — delivered as editable Word plus branded PDF. $249.99 one-time with
instant download, or $29 per individual SOP. The templates are customizable
starting points that a site adapts and validates against its own policies and
applicable regulations.

### PurpleSign
Native e-signatures for regulated documents, designed and tested against
21 CFR Part 11 (identity binding, signature manifestation, and an audit trail).
PurpleSign is a design standard implementation, not a certification.

### QuillPDF — https://quillpdf.com
Free PDF tools — merge, split, rotate, watermark, compress, clean metadata,
redact, Bates-number, convert to/from images, and OCR — that run entirely in
your browser. The tools never upload your file to a server; redaction uses
rasterize-on-redact, so the content beneath the mark is removed, not just
covered. The one exception to "nothing leaves your browser" is an optional,
off-by-default Send-for-Signature hand-off. QuillPDF is not a HIPAA service.

### Volstrin — https://volstrin.com
A boutique legal-sector search practice: a short, genuinely-matched shortlist
per search, contingency-based, with a replacement guarantee.

### Consulting — https://purpledirective.com/hire
Hands-on regulatory infrastructure for research sites: SOP development, binder
setup, IRB submission workflows, and gap assessment.

## Free resources

- How to read an FDA 483: https://purpledirective.com/how-to-read-an-fda-483

## Frequently asked

### Who is Purple Directive for?
Clinical research coordinators, principal investigators, sub-investigators, site
directors, and CRO operations staff — the people who run studies, not the
sponsors who fund them.

### Is Purple Directive's software Part 11 certified?
No — and it does not claim to be. There is no body that certifies Part 11
compliance. The software is designed and tested against 21 CFR Part 11; a site
makes its own regulatory attestation using the validation evidence provided.

### Does Purple Directive handle PHI?
Nexrial does, under an executed HIPAA Business Associate Agreement. The public
marketing site and QuillPDF do not store, transmit, or process PHI.

### How do I get in touch?
Email info@purpledirective.com, or book time via the contact paths on
https://purpledirective.com.
